business.name: Ashton Plumbing Care
business.tagline: Reliable Plumbing Solutions Across Greater Manchester

contact.address: 959 Ashton Old Rd, Openshaw, Higher Openshaw, Manchester M11 2SL

sample_reviews.author: Daniel Hartley
sample_reviews.text: Called Ashton Plumbing Care after a burst pipe caused real damage. They arrived within the hour and sorted everything efficiently. Brilliant service, very professional.

sample_reviews.author: Sharon Mellor
sample_reviews.text: Had a new boiler fitted and couldn't be happier. The lads were tidy, on time and explained everything clearly. Great value for money too.

sample_reviews.author: Kevin Omotayo
sample_reviews.text: Very responsive and honest about pricing upfront. Fixed a dodgy radiator valve that two other plumbers couldn't sort. Would recommend to anyone in the area.

brand.usp: Ashton Plumbing Care delivers fast, honest and affordable plumbing services across Manchester, with a local team you can trust for both everyday repairs and emergency callouts.
brand.hero_headline: Expert Plumbing Care On Your Doorstep
brand.about_paragraph: I'm the owner of Ashton Plumbing Care, based right here on Ashton Old Road in Openshaw, and I've been keeping Manchester homes running smoothly for years. Whether it's a leaking tap, a new bathroom, or an emergency callout, my team arrives promptly, works cleanly, and always charges fairly. We take real pride in our local reputation — and we're always just one call away.
